news.paragraph: Silver (SLV) is currently trading around $68.73, with recent headlines indicating a mixed environment for exchange-traded funds and equities. Traders are weighing factors such as inflation concerns, Treasury yield movements, and geopolitical developments including Iran deal prospects and US-Iran talks. While some reports show ETFs moving higher with US equities, others indicate declines amid broader market uncertainty and rising yields.
